sizing_rule.note: Position size scales proportionally to sigma distance from mean: (X - mean) / standard_deviation. Higher sigma = larger position; lower sigma = smaller position. Volatility-adjusted approach using standard normal deviate (Equation 3.16). Specific threshold values and base risk not provided by author.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be based on the number of standard deviations (sigma) a data point is from the mean, using the standard normal deviate to measure risk distance from expected value.
